title: Canada Revenue Agency forms listed by number - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada Revenue Agency forms listed by number
You may be looking for:
- T1 income tax package (forms and schedules)
The CRA offers a variety of forms and publications in alternate formats. Select the product of your choice below to download a large print PDF or e-text format. If the product you are looking for is not available in your preferred format, you can order it using our alternate formats order form .
This paginated table is initially sorted by Last update , so new and recently updated forms are listed first. You can also sort by Number or Title , or filter the list by entering any part of a form’s number or title in the Filter items field.
Rebate Application for Conventions
Statement of Discounting Transaction
